## PSC-HELPER v0.8.1 — Raid Quarantine & Owner Tools

Patch release on top of v0.8.0 with safer raid handling and additional owner commands.

### Highlights

- **Raid quarantine (default):** suspicious join bursts are muted and restricted but members stay on the server
- DM notifications when quarantine is applied or lifted
- New owner-only P.OS tools: `ping_user`, `dm_user`, `lift_restrictions`, `deactivate_raid_mode`
- Form channel automod exemptions and nickname parsing fixes
- Removed noisy update log channel behavior from 0.8 rollout

### Upgrade notes

- Default `raid_action` is now `quarantine` instead of immediate kick/ban
- Owners can lift restrictions manually via P.OS after reviewing quarantined accounts
